name: aurboda
description: Collect, aggregate, visualize your Quantified Self data
author: Fredrik Liljegren <fredrik@liljegren.org>

scripts.test: pnpm --filter aurboda-backend test && pnpm --filter aurboda-web test && pnpm test:android
scripts.check: pnpm --filter aurboda-backend check && pnpm --filter aurboda-web check && pnpm --filter @aurboda/api-spec check
